description: Generate and export a prediction table of upcoming visible ISS (ZARYA, NORAD 25544) passes over Griffith Observatory (34.1184 N, 118.3004 W, 350m). Filter for visible passes that reach at least 25 degrees in elevation. Export the resulting pass prediction table to /home/ga/Documents/iss_visible_passes.txt and leave the prediction dialog open. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
